steps.title: Follow the authority transfers
steps.content: The student wants the order in which government entities received authority over US airline safety. The notes give a sequence: Commerce Department in 1926, CAA in 1938, and FAA in 1958.

steps.title: Reject incomplete sequences
steps.content: B incorrectly sends authority back to the Commerce Department. C says the agencies held authority at different times but gives no order, and D mentions only the final agency. The choice that states both transfers with dates satisfies the goal. The answer is A.
